posts.author: smkatcad3 (S Moishy Klein)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am looking for a Auto-Scroll solution, a option that will scroll down (and up) through all items of a board.

We are a larger company and have a few main tables where teams collaborate on, we set up in each open work space a large screen for accountability and motivation. The problem is that only the first 20-30 (or less) items are seen.

Please comment and question
